data.title: Fitts's Law
data.description: Design elements are sized and positioned to enhance target acquisition speed.
data.technical_spec: Button sizes and spacing based on user interaction data.

data.title: Hick's Law
data.description: Minimizes the number of choices to reduce decision times.
data.technical_spec: Simplified navigation menu with drop-down options.

data.title: Pareto Principle
data.description: Focuses on the 20% of functionalities used by 80% of users.
data.technical_spec: User journey analytics to prioritize key features.

data.title: Miller's Law
data.description: Presentation of information is limited to the user's capacity to process chunks at a time.
data.technical_spec: Content structured into bite-sized pieces with progressive disclosure.

data.title: Jakob's Law
data.description: Design aligns with user expectations based on prevalent digital interfaces.
data.technical_spec: Industry-standard UI elements such as icons and gestures.
